blocks.text: Changes in the present value of defined benefit obligations have developed as follows:
Present value of defined benefit obligations
As of the beginning of the period 1,342 1,251
Past service cost (incl. curtailments and changes) 0 0
Recognised outside of profit or loss under ‘remeasurement of defined benefit pension plans’ in other comprehensive income −39 251
Changes in parameters on the basis of actuarial calculations led to a total increase in the
present value of defined benefit obligations by €247 million (2017/18: €−24 million). Most of
the effects result from the reduction of the applied invoice rates.
